note: Clinical terminology normalization dictionary for MedMe (docs/015 §3.5). Codes pulled from the local OMOP vocab (LOINC / RxNorm / ATC + OMOP standard concept_id). Conversions are affine: canonical_value = slope * source_value + intercept. LOINC property/scale is chosen to agree with canonical_unit (molar LOINC for SI molar canonicals). See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-terminology-normalization-layer-design.md.

entries.note: LOINC 33914-3 is the MDRD-formula eGFR; its OMOP concept (3030354) is non-standard (blank standard_concept) — OMOP has no clean standard eGFR measurement concept, so this is the best available and a deliberate deviation from the standard_concept='S' rule.

Canonical is molar urea (mmol/L, LOINC 22664-7). The mg/dL row assumes the source is BUN (urea nitrogen, as N): factor 0.357 = 10/28.014. This is correct for US labs reporting BUN in mg/dL (the near-universal mg/dL convention). Do NOT apply it to a value reporting urea mass in mg/dL (MW 60.06 → ×0.1665).

Generic serum/plasma glucose (LOINC 14749-6, Moles/volume). Fasting-specific aliases (空腹血糖/FPG/FBG) also map here in V1 — the fasting-vs-random distinction is not preserved. If that distinction is needed later, split to fasting LOINC 14771-0 (concept 3018251).

aliases: 天门冬氨酸氨基转移酶

entries.note: Potassium is monovalent, so mEq/L is numerically identical to mmol/L (slope 1).
Sodium is monovalent, so mEq/L equals mmol/L (slope 1).
Chloride is monovalent, so mEq/L equals mmol/L (slope 1).

Total calcium (LOINC 2000-8, Moles/volume). mg/dL->mmol/L factor 0.2495 = 10/40.078 (Ca MW). Alias uses 血钙/Ca/Ca2+ and NOT bare 'CA' to avoid collision with tumor markers CA-125/CA19-9 (which always carry their number). Ionized calcium is a distinct analyte and is intentionally not mapped here.
Serum inorganic phosphate (LOINC 14879-1, Moles/volume). mg/dL->mmol/L factor 0.3229 = 10/30.974 assumes the source reports elemental phosphorus (P), the near-universal mg/dL convention.
Serum magnesium (LOINC 2601-3, Moles/volume). mg/dL->mmol/L factor 0.4114 = 10/24.305 (Mg MW).

Mapped to Bicarbonate [Moles/volume] (LOINC 1963-8). Chinese chemistry panels labelled 二氧化碳结合力/CO2-CP/二氧化碳 measure total CO2 (bicarbonate + dissolved CO2), which is LOINC 2028-9 (Carbon dioxide, total, concept 3015632); both are reported in mmol/L and are clinically used interchangeably, so they fold to this entry. This is a venous chemistry measure, distinct from arterial blood-gas pCO2.

aliases: 半胱氨酸蛋白酶抑制剂C

entries.note: Spot-urine microalbumin (LOINC 14957-5, Mass/volume). Specimen is urine, kept distinct from serum 白蛋白/ALB (albumin) so the two never collapse.

Spot-urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio (LOINC 14959-1, Mass Ratio, mg/g). Some Chinese labs report ACR in mg/mmol against a distinct molar-ratio LOINC (Albumin/Creatinine [Molar ratio] 14585-4); that is a different unit basis and is intentionally NOT cross-converted here (no affine factor supplied) to avoid error.
Direct (conjugated) bilirubin (LOINC 14629-0, Moles/volume). mg/dL->umol/L factor 17.1 (bilirubin MW 584.66), same basis as total bilirubin.
Indirect (unconjugated) bilirubin (LOINC 14630-8, Moles/volume). mg/dL->umol/L factor 17.1 (bilirubin MW 584.66).
Serum globulin (LOINC 2336-6, specimen 'Serum'). Abbreviation GLB is kept distinct from glucose GLU; bare 'GL' is intentionally not added.

Albumin/Globulin ratio (LOINC 1759-0, Mass Ratio) — dimensionless. canonical_unit is the UCUM unity unit '1' with an identity conversion row (no unit conversion applies); it is a computed ratio, not a concentration.
Canonical is percent (e.g. 45 %). Analyzers/feeds that report HCT as a volume fraction (e.g. 0.45 L/L) use the L/L row (×100). Both express the same volume fraction; no method assumption.

entries.canonical_name: 平均红细胞血红蛋白量
aliases: 平均红细胞血红蛋白量
红细胞平均血红蛋白量

entries.canonical_name: 平均红细胞血红蛋白浓度
aliases: 平均红细胞血红蛋白浓度
红细胞平均血红蛋白浓度

entries.note: This is RDW-CV (coefficient of variation, reported in %). RDW-SD (standard deviation, reported in fL, LOINC 21000-5) is a different measurand and is NOT this entry — do not map RDW-SD here.
Absolute neutrophil count (ANC), distinct from the percentage entry neut_pct (770-8). The '#' aliases are kept qualified so they never collide with the '%' aliases of neut_pct.
Method-agnostic ESR (LOINC 30341-2). Chinese labs are predominantly Westergren (LOINC 4537-7, concept 3013707); values are read in mm/h regardless of method, so no conversion is needed.
INR is a dimensionless ratio (PT patient/PT normal, ISI-corrected). Canonical unit '1' (UCUM unity) with an identity row; there is no cross-unit conversion.

entries.canonical_name: 活化部分凝血活酶时间
aliases: 活化部分凝血活酶时间

entries.note: Canonical is FEU (fibrinogen-equivalent units), mg/L, LOINC 48065-7. The ug/mL (=mg/L numerically) and ng/mL (÷1000) rows are pure mass-unit scaling that ASSUME the source is also FEU. Do NOT convert between FEU and DDU (D-dimer units): FEU ≈ 2 × DDU is assay-dependent and not a fixed factor — a DDU-reported result must be treated as a different quantity, not scaled into this entry.

entries.canonical_name: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸
aliases: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸
entries.note: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸(free T3)。规范单位 pmol/L(molar,LOINC 14928-6 [Moles/volume])。部分实验室以质量单位 pg/mL 报告(FT3 分子量≈651);质量↔摩尔换算随分析方法而异,不作自动换算。区别于总T3(键 t3)。

aliases: 游离四碘甲状腺原氨酸
entries.note: 游离甲状腺素(free T4)。规范单位 pmol/L(molar,LOINC 14920-3 [Moles/volume])。部分实验室以质量单位 ng/dL 报告(FT4 分子量≈777);不作自动换算。区别于总T4(键 t4)。
总三碘甲状腺原氨酸(total T3)。规范单位 nmol/L(molar,LOINC 14930-2 [Moles/volume])。部分实验室以质量单位 ng/mL 报告;不作自动换算。区别于游离T3(键 ft3)。
总甲状腺素(total T4)。规范单位 nmol/L(molar,LOINC 14921-1 [Moles/volume])。部分实验室以质量单位 µg/dL 报告;不作自动换算。区别于游离T4(键 ft4)。

entries.canonical_name: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
aliases: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
抗甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
entries.note: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体(anti-TPO / TPOAb)。IU/mL 与 kIU/L 数值等同(1 IU/mL = 1 kIU/L)。
甲状腺球蛋白抗体(anti-Tg / TgAb)。刻意不使用裸缩写 'TG'/'Tg' 作别名——它与甘油三酯(triglycerides)的别名 'TG' 归一化后冲突。IU/mL 与 kIU/L 数值等同。
胰岛素(检测项,非药物)。规范单位 µIU/mL(UCUM u[IU]/mL);µIU/mL = mIU/L 数值等同。部分实验室以摩尔单位 pmol/L 报告(约 1 µIU/mL ≈ 6.0 pmol/L,但随标准品/方法而异),不作自动换算。空腹胰岛素别名在 V1 归此通用项。
C肽(connecting peptide)。规范单位 ng/mL(= µg/L)。nmol/L 摩尔单位换算基于 C肽分子量 3020.29:1 nmol/L = 3.020 ng/mL(即 1 ng/mL = 0.331 nmol/L)。
餐后2小时血糖(2-hour postprandial glucose,LOINC 14761-1 --2 hours post meal,molar)。与空腹/随机血糖(键 glucose)为独立项,故不使用裸别名 '血糖'/'葡萄糖'/'GLU' 以免冲突。OGTT 服糖后2小时血糖(post-75 g,LOINC 14995-5 / concept 3017538)为相关但不同的概念。

aliases: 氨基末端B型钠尿肽前体
entries.note: 氨基末端脑钠肽前体(NT-proBNP)。pg/mL = ng/L 数值等同。极少数以 pmol/L 报告,方法学相关,不作自动换算。与 BNP(键 bnp)为不同分析物。
脑钠肽(BNP)。pg/mL = ng/L 数值等同。与 NT-proBNP(键 nt_probnp)为不同分析物,数值不可互换。
超敏C反应蛋白(hs-CRP,LOINC 30522-7 高敏方法)。与常规 CRP(键 crp)为不同 LOINC/方法(高敏用于心血管风险分层),刻意分开;别名不含裸 'CRP'。mg/dL → mg/L 系数 10。
C反应蛋白(常规 CRP,LOINC 1988-5)。与超敏 hs-CRP(键 hscrp)为不同 LOINC/方法,刻意分开。mg/dL → mg/L 系数 10。
同型半胱氨酸(Hcy)。规范单位 µmol/L(molar,LOINC 13965-9)。质量单位 mg/L 在临床罕用(分子量 135.18),未列换算行。
肌酸激酶总活性(CK / CPK,catalytic activity)。与同工酶 CK-MB(键 ckmb)为不同项,别名不含 'MB'。
肌酸激酶 MB 同工酶。规范单位取活性 U/L(LOINC 32673-6 [catalytic activity],中国以活性法为主)。另有质量法 CK-MB mass(ng/mL,LOINC 13969-1 / concept 3005785):活性与质量为不同检测,数值不可互换,故未列换算行。
乳酸脱氢酶总活性(LDH,catalytic activity)。
心肌肌钙蛋白I(cTnI)。规范单位 ng/mL(= µg/L)。高敏 hs-cTnI 常以 ng/L 报告(1 ng/mL = 1000 ng/L);因方法/单位标注常不可靠,刻意不列 ng/L 自动换算,使用前须核对单位与方法。仅用限定别名(不含裸 '肌钙蛋白')以免与 cTnT 混淆。
心肌肌钙蛋白T(cTnT)。规范单位 ng/mL(= µg/L)。高敏 hs-cTnT 常以 ng/L 报告(1 ng/mL = 1000 ng/L);刻意不列 ng/L 自动换算,使用前须核对单位与方法。仅用限定别名(不含裸 '肌钙蛋白')以免与 cTnI 混淆。

Dipstick urine protein (LOINC 20454-5, [Presence]/ordinal). Result is qualitative/semi-quantitative reported as -, ±, +, ++, +++ — no numeric unit, so canonical_unit is null and units is empty. Distinct from serum albumin (blood 'ALB').

Dipstick urine glucose (LOINC 25428-4, [Presence]/ordinal), reported -, ±, +, ++, +++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null. Deliberately does NOT carry bare 'GLU'/'葡萄糖'/'血糖'/'Glucose' to avoid colliding with the serum glucose entry.
Dipstick urine blood/hemoglobin (LOINC 5794-3, [Presence]/ordinal), reported -, ±, +, ++, +++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null.
Dipstick urine ketones (LOINC 2514-8, [Presence]/ordinal), reported -, ±, +, ++, +++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null.

Dipstick urine leukocyte esterase (LOINC 5799-2, [Presence]/ordinal), reported -, ±, +, ++, +++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null. Deliberately does NOT carry bare '白细胞'/'WBC' to avoid colliding with the blood WBC-count entry.
Dipstick urine nitrite (LOINC 5802-4, [Presence]/ordinal), reported - / + (negative/positive) — qualitative, canonical_unit null.
Numeric dipstick urine specific gravity (LOINC 5811-5), typically 1.005–1.030. Dimensionless ratio — canonical_unit '1' (UCUM dimensionless), identity row only; there is no alternate unit to convert.

Numeric dipstick urine pH (LOINC 5803-2), typically 4.5–8.0 on the pH scale. pH is a dimensionless logarithmic scale with no meaningful unit conversion, so canonical_unit is null and units is empty. Does NOT carry bare 'pH' (reserved/ambiguous) or '尿酸' (that is uric acid).
AFP tumor marker (LOINC 1834-1, [Mass/volume]). ug/L is identical to ng/mL (same number).
CEA tumor marker (LOINC 2039-6, [Mass/volume]). ug/L is identical to ng/mL (same number).
CA19-9 tumor marker (LOINC 24108-3, [Units/volume]). U/mL = kU/L (same number). Uses the numbered alias only — never bare 'CA' (collides with calcium/other CA markers).
CA125 tumor marker (LOINC 10334-1, [Units/volume]). U/mL = kU/L (same number). Uses the numbered alias only — never bare 'CA'.
CA15-3 tumor marker (LOINC 6875-9, [Units/volume]). U/mL = kU/L (same number). Uses the numbered alias only — never bare 'CA'.
Total PSA (LOINC 2857-1, [Mass/volume]). ug/L is identical to ng/mL (same number). This is total PSA, not free PSA (fPSA).
Total 25-hydroxyvitamin D (D2+D3) (LOINC 68438-1, [Moles/volume]). Canonical is SI nmol/L. ng/mL → nmol/L uses the well-established factor 2.496 (MW 400.64 g/mol; 1 ng/mL = 2.496 nmol/L).
Ferritin (LOINC 2276-4, [Mass/volume]). Canonical ug/L; ng/mL is numerically identical (1 ng/mL = 1 ug/L), so both rows are slope 1.
Serum iron (LOINC 14798-3, [Moles/volume]). Canonical is SI molar umol/L. ug/dL → umol/L uses the well-established factor 0.1791 (Fe MW 55.845; 1 ug/dL = 0.1791 umol/L).
Vitamin B12 / cobalamin (LOINC 14685-2, [Moles/volume]). Canonical is SI molar pmol/L. pg/mL → pmol/L uses the well-established factor 0.7378 (cyanocobalamin MW 1355.37; 1 pg/mL = 0.7378 pmol/L).
Serum folate (LOINC 14732-2, [Moles/volume]). Canonical is SI molar nmol/L. ng/mL → nmol/L uses the well-established factor 2.266 (folic acid MW 441.4; 1 ng/mL = 2.266 nmol/L).

Canonical LOINC 59408-5 is SpO2 by pulse oximetry (the value patients see on a finger oximeter). Arterial-blood-gas SaO2 (LOINC 2708-6) is included as an alias and folds here in V1; if the pulse-ox-vs-ABG distinction is needed later, split SaO2 to its own entry.

Canonical unit is degree Celsius (UCUM 'Cel'). The [degF] row is the exact affine Fahrenheit→Celsius conversion C = (5/9)(F−32) = 0.5555555556·F − 17.7777777778. Bare 'T' is intentionally NOT an alias (collides with thyroid T3/T4).
Chinese name 格列本脲 = glibenclamide (INN); the RxNorm Ingredient is coded under the US synonym 'glyburide' (RxCUI 4815, ATC A10BB01) — same substance.
ATC is G04CA03 (alpha-adrenoceptor antagonist, urologicals) — verified against the OMOP ATC vocab. NOT C02CA04, which the vocab assigns to doxazosin.

低分子肝素/LMWH is strictly the drug class (low-molecular-weight heparin), not a single substance; enoxaparin is the most common representative in Chinese practice, so these class terms are mapped here as aliases per the item scope. Other LMWHs (那屈肝素/达肝素) would also normalize here in V1 — split if that distinction is needed.
RxNorm ingredient name is the US spelling 'Torsemide' (concept 942350); Chinese/INN spelling is torasemide. ATC C03CA04.
Methimazole (RxNorm) and thiamazole (INN/ATC H03BB02) are the same substance.

entries.canonical_name: 红细胞分布宽度标准差
aliases: 红细胞分布宽度标准差
entries.note: RDW-SD (standard deviation of the RBC volume histogram, reported in fL) — a DIFFERENT measurand from rdw (RDW-CV, %, LOINC 788-0). No conversion exists between them. LOINC 21000-5 is carried in the local OMOP vocab as concept 3015182 but is flagged Deprecated (blank standard_concept); it is still the correct LOINC for RDW-SD and there is no standard replacement concept, so this is a deliberate deviation from the standard_concept='S' rule (same precedent as egfr).

Canonical is the entitic-volume PDW (fL, LOINC 32207-3), which is what Chinese analyzers print. Some analyzers instead report PDW as a ratio in % (LOINC 51631-0) — that is a different measurand; do NOT scale a % value into fL.

Volume fraction of blood occupied by platelets, printed as % (e.g. 0.108–0.282 %). The bare abbreviation 'PCT' is deliberately NOT an alias: on Chinese reports PCT far more often means 降钙素原 (procalcitonin), so mapping it here would be a silent wrong match.
Standard CBC line on Sysmex/Mindray analyzers in China. No LOINC/OMOP concept for P-LCR was found in the local OMOP vocab, so codes are left empty rather than guessed.
Absolute count, distinct from mono_pct (%). The '#' aliases stay qualified so they never collide with the '%' aliases of mono_pct.

Reticulocytes as a fraction of erythrocytes, printed as % (LOINC 17849-1). Some analyzers print the same quantity as a per-mille/decimal fraction (e.g. 0.015); that is the same ratio scaled differently and is NOT auto-converted here.
Nucleated erythrocytes per 100 leukocytes (LOINC 58413-6) — the printed '%' is per-100-WBC, not per-100-RBC. Distinct measurand from nrbc_count.
Canonical is molar (µmol/L, LOINC 14800-7 [Moles/volume]) to agree with the SI convention used by Chinese labs. The ug/dL row is the iron-mass form: 10 (ug/L per ug/dL) / 55.845 (g/mol Fe) = 0.17907.
UIBC = TIBC − serum iron; a separately reported line, not derived here. Molar canonical (LOINC 22753-8); ug/dL factor as for tibc (Fe MW 55.845).
Mass-concentration transferrin (LOINC 3034-6, [Mass/volume]) — matches the g/L canonical. The generic no-method row is chosen over the nephelometry/immunoassay-specific ones.
Molar-fraction iron saturation (LOINC 14801-5), i.e. serum iron / TIBC × 100, consistent with the molar iron/TIBC canonicals in this dictionary.

aliases: 血清可溶性转铁蛋白受体
entries.note: Mass-concentration sTfR (LOINC 30248-9), matching the mg/L canonical. A molar LOINC (33210-6) also exists, but the mass↔molar factor depends on the assay's assumed receptor MW, so no molar row is listed. Absolute reference ranges are assay-specific.
Prothrombin activity as actual/normal, printed as % (LOINC 3289-6). Distinct from pt (seconds) and pt_ratio.
PT patient/normal ratio, dimensionless (UCUM unity). NOT the INR — the INR additionally applies the reagent ISI exponent (see the inr entry); do not map one to the other.
Thrombin time (LOINC 3243-3, method-agnostic). Distinct from PT/APTT; the bare alias 'TT' is only used here.

Chinese coagulation panels report FDP quantitatively in mg/L (= ug/mL). The local OMOP vocab has no quantitative [Mass/volume] LOINC for fibrin degradation products (only the qualitative agglutination concept 29263-1, [Presence]), so codes are left empty rather than mismatched to a qualitative concept.

Functional AT activity as actual/normal, printed as % (LOINC 27811-9, chromogenic — the method Chinese labs actually run; the vocab has no method-free activity concept). This is the activity assay, not the antigen (Ag) assay. Reports that print the Roman-numeral form 抗凝血酶Ⅲ are covered by the fullwidth/NFKC normalization step (Ⅲ → III), so it is not listed separately.
Hemolysis marker. Generic no-method mass/volume LOINC (4542-7) chosen over the nephelometry/electrophoresis rows. Bare 'HP' is deliberately not an alias (collides with 幽门螺杆菌 Hp on reports).
Units/volume LOINC 15061-5. 1 IU/L = 1 mIU/mL exactly, so the IU/L and U/L rows are identity scalings, not assumptions.
Nominal/qualitative result (A / B / O / AB). No unit and no conversion — deliberately canonical_unit null with an empty units[].
Nominal/qualitative result (阳性/阴性, i.e. RhD positive/negative). No unit and no conversion.
总胆汁酸(LOINC 14628-2,Bile acid [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma,molar → µmol/L)。中国生化肝功能常规项。
前白蛋白(LOINC 14338-8,Mass/volume,通用行,不选带方法学的行)。中国报告单常用 mg/L(参考区间约 200–400 mg/L);mg/dL → mg/L 为 ×10,g/L → mg/L 为 ×1000。
血清(假性)胆碱酯酶(LOINC 2098-2,Enzymatic activity/volume)。中国报告单多以 U/L 报(约 4000–13000 U/L),部分以 kU/L 报 → ×1000。
腺苷脱氨酶(LOINC 47826-3,Enzymatic activity/volume in Serum or Plasma)。
AST/ALT 比值(De Ritis 比值,LOINC 1916-6,Enzymatic activity ratio)。无量纲 → canonical_unit '1'(UCUM unity),仅 identity 行。
血清 β2-微球蛋白(LOINC 1952-1,Mass/volume in Serum or Plasma,通用行,不选免疫法专属行)。canonical mg/L;µg/mL 与 mg/L 数值等同。尿 β2-MG 是不同标本(未收录),不与本项 collapse。
血清视黄醇结合蛋白(LOINC 1836-6,Mass/volume in Serum or Plasma)。肾小管早期损伤指标。尿 RBP(LOINC 18362-4,24h 尿)为不同标本,未收录。
随机(点)尿肌酐(LOINC 14683-7,Moles/volume in Urine)。system=urine,与血清肌酐(key creatinine)绝不 collapse。mg/dL → mmol/L:1 mg/dL = 10 mg/L ÷ 113.12 g/mol = 88.42 µmol/L = 0.08842 mmol/L。
24 小时尿肌酐排泄量(LOINC 14684-5,Moles/time in 24 hour Urine)。mg/24h → mmol/24h:÷113.12 mg/mmol = ×0.008841。与随机尿肌酐(key urine_creatinine,浓度)是不同的量纲/概念,不 collapse。
24 小时尿蛋白定量(LOINC 2889-4,Protein [Mass/time] in 24 hour Urine)。定量项,与尿常规定性尿蛋白(key urine_protein,±/+ 半定量)是不同概念,别名刻意不含裸「尿蛋白」。
24 小时尿尿酸排泄量(LOINC 14935-1,Urate [Moles/time] in 24 hour Urine)。mg/24h → mmol/24h:÷168.11 mg/mmol(尿酸分子量)= ×0.005949。别名不含裸「尿酸」(血尿酸为 key uric_acid)。
载脂蛋白 A-I(LOINC 1869-7,Mass/volume in Serum or Plasma)。中国报告单规范单位 g/L(约 1.0–1.6 g/L);mg/dL → g/L 为 ×0.01。
载脂蛋白 B(LOINC 1884-6,Apolipoprotein B [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma,通用行;B-100 专属行 1871-3 未选,中国报告单的「载脂蛋白B100」实测即通用 ApoB)。
脂蛋白(a)(LOINC 10835-7,Mass/volume in Serum or Plasma)。中国报告单多用 mg/L(参考 <300 mg/L)。nmol/L(颗粒摩尔浓度)与质量浓度无固定换算系数(取决于 apo(a) isoform 大小),故刻意不列。

entries.canonical_name: 小而密低密度脂蛋白胆固醇
aliases: 小而密低密度脂蛋白胆固醇
小密低密度脂蛋白胆固醇
entries.note: 小而密 LDL 胆固醇(LOINC 96959-2,Cholesterol.in LDL.small dense [Moles/volume],molar 与 canonical mmol/L 一致)。mg/dL → mmol/L 用胆固醇分子量 386.65:10 ÷ 386.65 = 0.02586。
游离脂肪酸(LOINC 15066-4,Fatty acids.nonesterified [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma,molar)。中国报告单常用 mmol/L 或 µmol/L。质量浓度(mg/dL)换算依赖脂肪酸组成的平均分子量,不唯一 → 不列。

entries.canonical_name: 非高密度脂蛋白胆固醇
aliases: 非高密度脂蛋白胆固醇
entries.note: 非 HDL 胆固醇(总胆固醇 − HDL-C;LOINC 70204-3,Cholesterol non HDL [Moles/volume],molar 与 canonical mmol/L 一致)。mg/dL → mmol/L:10 ÷ 386.65 = 0.02586。
糖化白蛋白(LOINC 13873-5,Albumin.glycated/Albumin.total in Serum or Plasma —— 即临床报告的 GA%,占总白蛋白百分比,与 canonical_unit '%' 一致)。质量浓度型 LOINC 1758-2(Albumin.glycated [Mass/volume])是另一概念,未选。反映近 2–3 周血糖。
餐后/服糖后 2 小时 C 肽(LOINC 58686-7,C peptide [Mass/volume] --2 hours post dose glucose)。与空腹/基础 C 肽(key c_peptide)独立,故别名不含裸「C肽」。nmol/L 换算同 c_peptide:分子量 3020.29,1 nmol/L = 3.02 ng/mL。
餐后/服糖后 2 小时胰岛素(LOINC 47659-8,Insulin [Units/volume] --2 hours post dose glucose,与 canonical µIU/mL 的 Units/volume property 一致)。空腹/基础胰岛素归 key insulin。pmol/L 随标准品变(≈6.0 pmol/L per µIU/mL),不作自动换算。

aliases: 稳态模型评估胰岛素抵抗指数
entries.note: HOMA-IR(LOINC 47214-2,Homeostasis model assessment)。计算值 =(空腹胰岛素 µIU/mL × 空腹血糖 mmol/L)/ 22.5,无量纲 → canonical_unit '1',仅 identity 行。
阴离子间隙(LOINC 10466-1,Anion gap in Serum or Plasma by Calculated.3Ions:Na⁺ −(Cl⁻ + HCO₃⁻))。计算值。mEq/L 与 mmol/L 对单价离子和数值等同。
乳酸(LOINC 2524-7,Lactate [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma,molar 与 canonical mmol/L 一致)。mg/dL → mmol/L:10 ÷ 90.08 g/mol = 0.1110。注意与乳酸脱氢酶(key ldh)是不同项。
血清/血浆渗透压(LOINC 2692-2,Osmolality of Serum or Plasma)。canonical mOsm/kg(每千克水的毫渗量)。尿渗透压是不同标本(未收录),不与本项 collapse。
血氨(LOINC 16362-6,Ammonia [Moles/volume] in Plasma,molar)。µg/dL → µmol/L:10 ÷ 17.03 g/mol(NH₃)= 0.5872。肝性脑病相关。
动脉血 pH(LOINC 2744-1,pH of Arterial blood)。血气分析项,system=arterial blood,与尿 pH(key urine_ph)绝不 collapse —— 故别名不含裸「pH」。canonical_unit 为 UCUM 的 [pH],对数标度,无单位换算。
动脉血二氧化碳分压(LOINC 2019-8,Carbon dioxide [Partial pressure] in Arterial blood)。kPa → mmHg:×7.50062。与静脉生化的二氧化碳结合力/总 CO₂(key bicarbonate)是不同概念。
动脉血氧分压(LOINC 2703-7,Oxygen [Partial pressure] in Arterial blood)。kPa → mmHg:×7.50062。与血氧饱和度(key spo2,%)是不同项。
动脉血碱剩余(LOINC 1925-7,Base excess in Arterial blood by calculation)。可为负值(碱缺失)。mEq/L 与 mmol/L 数值等同。
血清淀粉酶(LOINC 1798-8,Enzymatic activity/volume in Serum or Plasma,总淀粉酶通用行)。尿淀粉酶是不同标本,未收录,不与本项 collapse。
血清脂肪酶(LOINC 3040-3,Enzymatic activity/volume in Serum or Plasma)。急性胰腺炎指标,与淀粉酶配套。

Generic (untimed) serum cortisol: LOINC 2143-6 has no time qualifier, matching a report line that just says 皮质醇. Timed draws are separate entries (cortisol_8am / cortisol_4pm / cortisol_midnight). Canonical is mass (ug/dL) to agree with the [Mass/volume] LOINC; nmol/L (molar) is deliberately NOT listed — a molar source unit needs the molar LOINC (15044-1 family), not this one.
LOINC 48104-4 = Cortisol --8 AM specimen. Kept distinct from the untimed cortisol entry because the reference interval is time-of-day specific.
LOINC 21226-6 = Cortisol --4 PM specimen.
LOINC 48098-8 = Cortisol --12 AM specimen (midnight).

LOINC 2147-7 = Cortisol Free [Mass/time] in 24 hour Urine — an excretion rate, so canonical is mass per collection (ug/24h), not a concentration. nmol/24h row uses cortisol MW 362.46 g/mol (1 nmol = 0.36246 ug). A lab reporting ug/L on a spot urine is a DIFFERENT concept — do not map it here.

aliases: 促肾上腺皮质激素测定
entries.note: Plasma only (EDTA) — LOINC 2141-0 is [Mass/volume] in Plasma; serum ACTH is not a valid specimen.

Canonical ng/dL matches the [Mass/volume] LOINC 1763-2. pmol/L row uses aldosterone MW 360.44 g/mol: 1 pmol/L = 0.36044 pg/mL = 0.036044 ng/dL. Posture-specific LOINCs exist (supine 1767-3 / upright 1768-1); a report line that states posture is still mapped here — posture is not carried in the dictionary.
Enzymatic-activity concept (angiotensin I generation rate) — LOINC 2915-7. Distinct from direct renin concentration (renin_direct); the two are NOT interconvertible.
LOINC 35570-1 = Renin [Mass/volume] in Plasma. Many Chinese labs report DRC in uIU/mL; the pg/mL <-> uIU/mL factor is assay/standard dependent, so no uIU/mL row is given rather than guessing.

aliases: 醛固酮与肾素活性比值
entries.note: A ratio, so unit is dimensionless ("1"). WARNING: the numeric scale depends on which units the two components were reported in ((ng/dL)/(ng/mL/h) in most Chinese labs vs (pmol/L)/(mU/L) elsewhere) — the dictionary cannot rescale it, so consumers must not compare ARR across labs.

entries.canonical_name: 血浆游离甲氧基肾上腺素
aliases: 血浆游离甲氧基肾上腺素
entries.note: Plasma FREE metanephrine (LOINC 38494-1). nmol/L row uses metanephrine MW 197.23 g/mol (1 nmol/L = 197.23 ng/L = 197.23 pg/mL). Urine metanephrine is a different concept and is not mapped here.

entries.canonical_name: 血浆游离甲氧基去甲肾上腺素
aliases: 血浆游离甲氧基去甲肾上腺素
游离甲氧基去甲肾上腺素
entries.note: Plasma FREE normetanephrine (LOINC 57462-4). nmol/L row uses normetanephrine MW 183.20 g/mol.
Catecholamine panel component. nmol/L row uses epinephrine MW 183.20 g/mol. No short abbreviation alias ("E") is registered — too ambiguous on OCR text.
nmol/L row uses norepinephrine MW 169.18 g/mol. Bare "NE" is NOT an alias — it collides with neutrophil abbreviations (NE% / NE#) already in the dictionary.
LOINC 3122-9 = [Mass/time] in 24 hour Urine → canonical is an excretion rate (mg/24h). umol/24h row uses VMA MW 198.17 g/mol (1 umol = 0.19817 mg).
umol/L row uses DHEA-S MW 368.49 g/mol: 1 umol/L = 368.49 ug/L = 36.849 ug/dL.

The abbreviation "Tg" is deliberately NOT an alias: after case-folding it collides with "TG" = 甘油三酯 (triglycerides), which is already in the dictionary and far more common on Chinese reports. A raw "TG" must keep resolving to triglycerides.

entries.canonical_name: 促甲状腺激素受体抗体
aliases: 促甲状腺激素受体抗体
甲状腺刺激激素受体抗体
entries.note: Third-generation TRAb assays report IU/L (= U/L). TSI (刺激性抗体, bioassay, % of basal) is a different concept and must not be mapped here.
1 mIU/mL = 1 IU/L exactly (unit rescale, not an assay conversion).
pmol/L row uses estradiol MW 272.38 g/mol: 1 pmol/L = 0.27238 pg/mL.
nmol/L row uses progesterone MW 314.46 g/mol. Bare "P" is NOT an alias — it already resolves to 无机磷 (phosphate) in the dictionary.

TOTAL testosterone (LOINC 2986-8). Free testosterone (2991-8) is a distinct analyte and is not mapped here. nmol/L row uses testosterone MW 288.42 g/mol. Bare "T" is not an alias — too ambiguous (T3/T4/temperature).
Mass units only. The ng/mL <-> mIU/L (uIU/mL) factor depends on the WHO IS the assay is calibrated to (~21.2 for 3rd IS, but vendor-specific), so no IU row is given rather than guessing.
Canonical is molar (nmol/L), matching the [Moles/volume] LOINC 13967-5 — this is how SHBG is universally reported. A mass LOINC (2942-1) exists but is not used.

LOINC calls this Mullerian inhibiting substance (38476-8, [Mass/volume]). Mass units only: the pmol/L conversion (~7.14 pmol/L per ng/mL) is a vendor convention rather than a clean molar-mass calculation, so it is deliberately omitted.

aliases: 谷氨酸脱羧酶自身抗体
entries.note: LOINC 13926-1 = Glutamate decarboxylase 65 Ab [Units/volume] in Serum. Some Chinese labs report GADA only as 阴性/阳性 — a qualitative result still maps here; the value, not the concept, differs.

Qualitative (阴性/阳性) — LOINC 31547-3 = Pancreatic islet cell Ab [Presence] in Serum, which is how Chinese labs almost always report ICA. A titer/units-per-volume ICA result is a different LOINC (13927-9 / 8086-1) and is not mapped here.
Qualitative (阴性/阳性) — LOINC 2481-0 = Insulin Ab [Presence] in Serum. Distinct from 胰岛素 (insulin, already in the dictionary): this is the antibody, not the hormone.

LOINC 2731-8 = Parathyrin.intact [Mass/volume] (the intact/1-84 assay every routine lab runs). pmol/L row uses PTH(1-84) MW 9425 g/mol: 1 pmol/L = 9.425 pg/mL. Bare "PT" is NOT an alias — it is 凝血酶原时间 in the dictionary.
Chinese reports usually name the N-MID fragment assay (Roche); LOINC has no separate N-MID code, so both map to 2697-1. Bare "OC" is not an alias — too ambiguous.

aliases: I型胶原羧基末端肽β特殊序列
entries.note: Serum β-CrossLaps (LOINC 41171-0, [Mass/volume] in Serum/Plasma). The pg/mL row matters: Chinese reports use ng/mL and pg/mL interchangeably for the same assay (0.3 ng/mL = 300 pg/mL). Urine CTX (48586-2) is a different concept.

entries.canonical_name: 总I型胶原氨基端延长肽
aliases: 总I型胶原氨基端延长肽
I型前胶原氨基端延长肽
entries.note: LOINC 47255-5 = Procollagen type I.N-terminal propeptide [Mass/volume] in Serum. Do not confuse with P3NP (type III, 71792-6).

Canonical is enzymatic activity (U/L), matching LOINC 1777-2 [Enzymatic activity/volume]. Some labs report BALP as mass (ug/L) — that is a DIFFERENT LOINC (17838-4) and the two are not interconvertible, so no ug/L row is given. Bare ALP/AKP stay mapped to total 碱性磷酸酶.
Mass units only. The ng/mL <-> mIU/L factor depends on the IS the assay is calibrated to (~3.0 for WHO 98/574, older assays ~2.6), so no IU row is given rather than guessing.

LOINC 2486-9 is named "Somatomedins [Mass/volume]" — the historical name for IGF-1; it is the only standard mass/volume IGF concept in the vocab. nmol/L row uses IGF-1 MW 7649 g/mol (1 nmol/L = 7.649 ng/mL).

aliases: 肌酸激酶同工酶(质量法)
entries.note: CK-MB 质量法(mass,LOINC 13969-1 [Mass/volume],ng/mL = µg/L)。与活性法 CK-MB(键 ckmb,U/L,LOINC 32673-6)是不同检测,数值不可互换,故两条分立、无换算行。中国报告单两种都常见:标 ng/mL/µg/L 者为质量法,标 U/L 者为活性法。
血清/血浆肌红蛋白(心肌损伤早期标志物)。ng/mL = µg/L。与尿肌红蛋白(不同 system)不 collapse。别名不含裸 'MB' 以免与 CK-MB 冲突。
α-羟丁酸脱氢酶(酶活性 U/L,LOINC 1677-4)。心肌酶谱常规项。注意与 β-羟丁酸脱氢酶(LOINC 1682-4)是不同分析物,别名刻意不含裸 '羟丁酸' 单字模糊写法之外的 β 形式。
高敏法心肌肌钙蛋白 T(LOINC 67151-1,High sensitivity method)。规范单位 ng/L(= pg/mL),高敏法国际通行报告单位。与常规 cTnT(键 troponin_t,ng/mL)方法不同、数值区间差 1000 倍,刻意分立条目;此处列出的 ng/mL→ng/L ×1000 仅为单位换算,不代表两种方法可互换。
高敏法心肌肌钙蛋白 I(LOINC 89579-7,High sensitivity method)。规范单位 ng/L(= pg/mL)。与常规 cTnI(键 troponin_i,ng/mL)方法不同,刻意分立条目。
降钙素原(细菌感染/脓毒症标志物,LOINC 33959-8 [Mass/volume])。ng/mL = µg/L。
白细胞介素-6(炎症因子,LOINC 26881-3 [Mass/volume])。pg/mL = ng/L。
血清淀粉样蛋白 A(急性时相反应蛋白,常与 CRP 同报,LOINC 48498-0 [Mass/volume])。mg/L = µg/mL。
细菌内毒素定量(鲎试剂/LAL 法)。OMOP LOINC 中唯一标准概念 20797-7 是 'Endotoxin identified in Specimen'(定性/标本鉴定),与中国报告单的定量 pg/mL 属性矛盾,故不给码(codes 为空)而非硬套。EU/mL 与 pg/mL 的换算依赖标准品与批次,不做自动换算。
血清 1,3-β-D 葡聚糖(G 试验,侵袭性真菌感染筛查,LOINC 42176-8 [Mass/volume] in Serum)。pg/mL = ng/L。与 GM 试验(键 galactomannan)是不同检测。

曲霉半乳甘露聚糖抗原(GM 试验)。国内报告通常给无量纲的 GM 指数(I 值 / S-CO 比值),阈值 ~0.5;OMOP 里的候选 LOINC(35383-9 / 44357-2)property 均为 [Units/volume],与无量纲指数矛盾,按 §6 红线 3 不硬套 → codes 留空、canonical_unit 为 null。日后若确定实验室报告为质量浓度(µg/L),再另立定量条目。
抗链球菌溶血素 O(LOINC 5370-2 [Units/volume],IU/mL)。旧 Todd 单位与 IU 非严格等价,故不列 Todd/U/mL 换算行。滴度法(titer)报告为倍数,属不同 scale,不在此条。
肥达试验(伤寒/副伤寒血清凝集)。结果是一组滴度(O、H、A、B、C 各一效价,如 1:80),不是单一数值,故 canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空。OMOP LOINC 只有各分项(Salmonella typhi O/H Ab [Titer] 等)且无整组 panel 标准概念,按红线 4 不把多概念塞进一个码 → codes 留空。分项如需入库应各自立条目。

aliases: 结核感染T细胞斑点试验
结核杆菌特异性细胞免疫反应检测
entries.note: 结核感染 T 细胞检测(γ-干扰素释放试验,T-SPOT.TB / QuantiFERON)。结果报告为定性结论(阴性/阳性/不确定),故 canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空;LOINC 71773-6 为 [Interpretation] Qualitative,与定性一致。抗原孔斑点数(ESAT-6/CFP10,LOINC 74278-3 / 74277-5)是另外的定量项,未在本条内 collapse。
乙肝五项之一。定性结果(阴性/阳性,或以 S/CO 比值判读),无统一数值单位 → canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空;LOINC 5196-1 为 [Presence],与定性一致。定量(IU/mL)见 hbsag_quant。

aliases: 乙型肝炎表面抗原定量

乙肝五项之一。定性结果(阴性/阳性)→ canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空;LOINC 22322-2 为 [Presence]。定量(mIU/mL,评估疫苗免疫力)见 hbsab_quant。

aliases: 乙型肝炎表面抗体定量
entries.note: 乙肝表面抗体定量(LOINC 16935-9 [Units/volume])。规范单位 mIU/mL;1 mIU/mL = 1 IU/L(数值等同)。免疫保护阈值常用 ≥10 mIU/mL。
乙肝五项之一。定性结果(阴性/阳性,或 S/CO 判读)→ canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空;LOINC 13954-3 为 [Presence]。
乙肝五项之一。定性结果(阴性/阳性)→ canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空;LOINC 13953-5 为 [Presence]。
乙肝五项之一(总核心抗体)。定性结果(阴性/阳性)→ canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空;LOINC 13952-7 为 [Presence]。抗-HBc IgM(急性感染)是另一分析物,未在此条 collapse。
HBV DNA 病毒载量(LOINC 29615-2 [#/volume],拷贝数/mL)。IU/mL 与 copies/mL 的换算系数依检测平台而异(约 5~6 copies/IU,非通用常数),故刻意不列 IU/mL 换算行;若报告单位是 IU/mL,使用前须核对平台。
丙型肝炎病毒抗体(筛查)。定性结果(阴性/阳性,常附 S/CO)→ canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空;LOINC 13955-0 为 [Presence] by Immunoassay。HCV RNA 定量是另一项,不在此条。

aliases: 人类免疫缺陷病毒抗体
entries.note: HIV 1+2 型抗体筛查(LOINC 31201-7 [Presence] by Immunoassay)。定性(阴性/阳性,阳性需确证试验)→ canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空。第四代抗原抗体联合(HIV Ag/Ab combo)是另一 LOINC,未在此条 collapse。

甲型肝炎病毒 IgM 抗体(急性甲肝,LOINC 13950-1 [Presence] by Immunoassay)。定性 → canonical_unit 为 null、units 为空。总抗体(IgG+IgM,提示既往感染/免疫)是另一分析物,不在此条。
Quantitative RF (LOINC 11572-5, Units/volume). kIU/L is dimensionally identical to IU/mL. Latex-agglutination titer results are a different LOINC (5299-3) and are not modelled here.
Quantitative anti-CCP (LOINC 53027-9, Units/volume). RU/mL and AU/mL are assay-specific and NOT interconvertible with U/mL, so they are deliberately not listed.
Qualitative (阴性/阳性), often reported with an IF titer (1:80/1:160/…) and a staining pattern. LOINC 8061-4 is the Ord (Presence) concept; the Titer concept is 29953-7. No canonical unit.
Quantitative ELISA form (LOINC 5130-0, Units/volume). Crithidia-IF titer results are a different concept (34187-5) and not modelled here.
ENA panel member; reported qualitatively (阴性/阳性/±) on immunoblot. LOINC 31627-3 is Ord (Presence). No canonical unit.
ENA panel member, qualitative (LOINC 8093-7, Presence). Ro-52/Ro-60 subtypes are separate concepts and not modelled.
ENA panel member, qualitative (LOINC 8094-5, Presence).
ENA panel member, qualitative (LOINC 8091-1, Presence).
ENA panel member (systemic sclerosis), qualitative (LOINC 8092-9, Presence).
ENA panel member (myositis), qualitative (LOINC 8076-2, Presence).
Mass-concentration LOINC (4485-9) matches the mass canonical unit g/L.
Mass-concentration LOINC (4498-2) matches the mass canonical unit g/L.
Total serum IgG (LOINC 2465-3, mass/volume). IgG4 subclass is a different analyte and is not covered.
Total IgE. LOINC 19113-0 is Units/volume (IU/mL); kIU/L is identical. ng/mL uses the WHO IgE standard 1 IU = 2.4 ng (slope 1/2.4 = 0.4167).

aliases: 核周型抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体
entries.note: Qualitative IF pattern (阴性/阳性), LOINC 30539-1 = Neutrophil cytoplasmic Ab.perinuclear [Presence]. No canonical unit; a titer may accompany the result.

entries.canonical_name: 胞浆型抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体
aliases: 胞浆型抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体
抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体
entries.note: Qualitative IF pattern (阴性/阳性), LOINC 30538-3 = Neutrophil cytoplasmic Ab.classic [Presence]. The bare alias 'ANCA'/'抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体' is attached here as the closest concept; an unqualified ANCA order maps to LOINC 17351-8 — treat the code as approximate when the pattern is unspecified.
Quantitative (LOINC 6969-0, Units/volume). RU/mL and AU/mL are assay-specific and not interconvertible with U/mL, so they are not listed.
Quantitative (LOINC 6968-2, Units/volume). RU/mL and AU/mL are assay-specific and not interconvertible with U/mL.

Qualitative total anticardiolipin (LOINC 29860-4, Presence). Isotype-specific quantitative forms (IgG in GPL-U/mL, IgM in MPL-U/mL) are separate LOINCs with non-interconvertible units; not modelled here, hence no canonical unit.
Qualitative genotype/antigen presence (阴性/阳性). LOINC 4821-5 = HLA-B27 [Presence]. No unit.

神经元特异度烯醇化酶

Mass-concentration LOINC (9679-2) matches ng/mL. The Units/volume form (19207-0) is a different property and deliberately not used.
No LOINC/OMOP concept for ProGRP exists in the local OMOP vocab (searched 'ProGRP' and 'gastrin-releasing') — codes left empty rather than fabricated. pg/mL and ng/L are dimensionally identical.

entries.note: Free β-hCG (LOINC 19180-9), the marker used in prenatal screening; distinct from total β-hCG.

Dipstick urine urobilinogen (LOINC 5818-0, [Presence] by test strip). Reported normal/±/+/++ — qualitative/semi-quantitative, canonical_unit null. Chinese labs sometimes print a µmol/L scale on the strip; that is a strip-scale label, not a measured concentration, so no numeric conversion is supplied.

Dipstick urine bilirubin (LOINC 5770-3, [Presence] by test strip), reported -, ±, +, ++, +++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null. Deliberately does NOT carry bare '胆红素'/'Bilirubin'/'TBIL' — those belong to the serum total/direct bilirubin entries.

Dipstick urine ascorbic acid (LOINC 1904-2, Ascorbate [Presence] in Urine), reported -/+/++ — qualitative, canonical_unit null. Interferent flag: a positive VC can falsely lower 尿糖/尿潜血 strip results. Bare '维生素C' is NOT claimed here so a future serum vitamin C entry does not collide. 刻意不收裸「VC/VitC/Ascorbate」:那在血清/处方语境指血维生素C或维生素C制剂。
Urine color (LOINC 5778-6), a nominal text result (淡黄/黄色/深黄/red …). No unit, canonical_unit null.
Urine appearance/clarity (LOINC 5767-9), nominal text (清亮/微浊/浑浊). No unit, canonical_unit null.

Quantitative urine-sediment erythrocyte concentration from a urine-formed-element analyzer (LOINC 30391-7, [#/volume] in Urine). Canonical /uL; 10*6/L is the identical quantity (1 /uL = 1e6/L). Microscopy results reported per high-power field (/HP) are a DIFFERENT scale — the /uL↔/HP factor depends on centrifugation/concentration, so no conversion row is given and /HP values must not be folded in. Distinct from the blood RBC count entry.

Quantitative urine-sediment leukocyte concentration (LOINC 30405-5, [#/volume] in Urine). Canonical /uL (= 10*6/L). Separate from the dipstick 尿白细胞酯酶 (qualitative) entry and from the blood WBC count; bare '白细胞'/'WBC'/'LEU' are intentionally NOT claimed. /HP microscopy counts are a different scale with no fixed conversion.
Urine epithelial cells by analyzer (LOINC 30383-4, [#/volume] in Urine), canonical /uL (= 10*6/L). Microscopy /HP counts have no fixed conversion to /uL and are left unconverted.

Urine casts by automated formed-element count (LOINC 51483-6, [#/volume] in Urine), canonical /uL (= 10*6/L). Microscopy reports counts per low-power field (/LP) — a different scale with no determinate conversion, so no /LP row is supplied.

Urine bacteria count from a formed-element analyzer (LOINC 105907-0, [#/volume] in Urine), canonical /uL (= 10*6/L). This is NOT a urine culture colony count (CFU/mL) — do not fold culture results here.

Urine crystals (LOINC 87828-0, [Presence] in Urine) — reported as 未见/少量/+ or by crystal type. Qualitative/nominal, canonical_unit null. Analyzer /uL crystal counts exist but are not comparable across scales; kept qualitative deliberately.
Volume of a 24-hour urine collection (LOINC 3167-4). Canonical mL; L→mL is exact (×1000). Bare '尿量' is not claimed (could mean a spot/timed volume).

Fecal occult blood / gastrointestinal hemoglobin (LOINC 2335-8, [Presence] in Stool), reported 阴性/阳性 (-/+) — qualitative, canonical_unit null. Specimen is stool: kept strictly distinct from 尿隐血 (urine dipstick blood); bare '隐血'/'潜血'/'Occult blood' belong to that urine entry and are NOT claimed here.

Stool leukocytes by microscopy, counted per high-power field (LOINC 51770-6, [#/area] by Microscopy HPF). Canonical /[HPF] (UCUM), identity row only — a /HP count has no determinate conversion to any volumetric unit. Frequently reported as 未见/0-2/HP; the non-numeric '未见' stays qualitative. Distinct from blood WBC and from 尿白细胞.

Stool erythrocytes (LOINC 33668-5, Erythrocytes [Presence] in Stool). Chinese reports print 未见 or a per-HP count, but the local LOINC set has no [#/area]-per-HPF stool erythrocyte concept, so this entry stays qualitative: canonical_unit null, no fabricated unit. Distinct from blood RBC and from 尿红细胞.
Ova and parasites identified in stool by light microscopy (LOINC 10704-5). Result is 未见/organism name — nominal, canonical_unit null.

Fecal calprotectin, mass-per-mass LOINC 38445-3 ([Mass/mass] in Stool). Canonical µg/g stool; mg/kg is the same quantity (×1). A minority of assays report mg/L of extract (LOINC 82874-9, Mass/volume) — that is a different property and is NOT convertible here, so no such row is given.

Fecal transferrin, the second marker of the Chinese 便隐血双联 (Hb + Tf) immunoassay card; reported 阴性/阳性. The only stool-transferrin LOINC in the local vocab (86271-4) is [Mass/volume] by immunoassay — a quantitative property that does not match the qualitative card result, so codes are intentionally left empty rather than mis-coded. Distinct from serum transferrin.
Stool color (LOINC 9397-1) — nominal text (黄褐/褐色/黑色/陶土色). No unit, canonical_unit null.
Stool consistency/appearance (LOINC 11029-6) — nominal text (软便/成形/稀便/水样便). No unit, canonical_unit null.

entries.note: NLR = 中性粒细胞绝对值 / 淋巴细胞绝对值,无量纲 → canonical_unit '1'(UCUM unity)。OMOP vocab 中未检索到对应 LOINC 标准概念(LOINC 无 neutrophil/lymphocyte ratio 行)→ codes 留空,不编造。

aliases: 血小板与淋巴细胞比值

5'-核苷酸酶(LOINC 1690-7,[Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma → U/L)。胆汁淤积/肝胆疾病常用,与 ALP、GGT 同组开单。
α-L-岩藻糖苷酶(LOINC 24045-7,Alpha fucosidase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma → U/L)。国内肝功/肝癌辅助诊断常规项。

aliases: 乳酸脱氢酶同工酶 LDH1
entries.note: 乳酸脱氢酶同工酶 LDH-1(LOINC 2536-1,Lactate dehydrogenase 1/Lactate dehydrogenase.total in Serum or Plasma by Electrophoresis,catalytic activity fraction → %)。国内同工酶电泳按占总 LDH 的百分比报告,故 canonical_unit '%' 与 LOINC property(CFr)一致;总 LDH 活性(U/L)见 key ldh。

aliases: 乳酸脱氢酶同工酶 LDH2
entries.note: 乳酸脱氢酶同工酶 LDH-2(LOINC 2539-5,Lactate dehydrogenase 2/Lactate dehydrogenase.total in Serum or Plasma by Electrophoresis,catalytic activity fraction → %)。国内同工酶电泳按占总 LDH 的百分比报告,故 canonical_unit '%' 与 LOINC property(CFr)一致;总 LDH 活性(U/L)见 key ldh。

aliases: 乳酸脱氢酶同工酶 LDH3
entries.note: 乳酸脱氢酶同工酶 LDH-3(LOINC 2542-9,Lactate dehydrogenase 3/Lactate dehydrogenase.total in Serum or Plasma by Electrophoresis,catalytic activity fraction → %)。国内同工酶电泳按占总 LDH 的百分比报告,故 canonical_unit '%' 与 LOINC property(CFr)一致;总 LDH 活性(U/L)见 key ldh。

entries.note: 乳酸脱氢酶同工酶 LDH-4(LOINC 2545-2,Lactate dehydrogenase 4/Lactate dehydrogenase.total in Serum or Plasma by Electrophoresis,catalytic activity fraction → %)。国内同工酶电泳按占总 LDH 的百分比报告,故 canonical_unit '%' 与 LOINC property(CFr)一致;总 LDH 活性(U/L)见 key ldh。

aliases: 乳酸脱氢酶同工酶 LDH5
entries.note: 乳酸脱氢酶同工酶 LDH-5(LOINC 2548-6,Lactate dehydrogenase 5/Lactate dehydrogenase.total in Serum or Plasma by Electrophoresis,catalytic activity fraction → %)。国内同工酶电泳按占总 LDH 的百分比报告,故 canonical_unit '%' 与 LOINC property(CFr)一致;总 LDH 活性(U/L)见 key ldh。
随机(点)尿 α1-微球蛋白(LOINC 46723-3,[Mass/volume] in Urine → mg/L)。肾小管损伤标志物,与血清 β2-微球蛋白(key beta2_microglobulin)是不同分析物/不同标本,绝不 collapse;别名不含裸「微球蛋白」以免与 β2-MG 冲突。

entries.canonical_name: 尿N-乙酰-β-D-氨基葡萄糖苷酶
aliases: 尿N-乙酰-β-D-氨基葡萄糖苷酶
entries.note: 尿 NAG 酶(LOINC 33354-2,N-acetyl-beta-glucosaminidase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Urine → U/L)。注意是 β 型(N-acetyl-β-D-glucosaminidase);LOINC 中的 Alpha-N-acetylglucosaminidase(2644-3)是另一个酶(黏多糖病 IIIB),刻意不使用。肾小管损伤标志物。

随机血糖。LOINC 无独立的 random-glucose 行:14749-6(Glucose [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma,无采样时点限定)本身就是「不限时点」的通用葡萄糖,故与 key glucose 共用同一 LOINC/OMOP 码,但保留独立 key,使「随机血糖」不会被吞进 glucose(现携带空腹别名)或错配到 glucose_2h_pp(餐后 2h,LOINC 14761-1)。若后续要严格区分空腹,应把 glucose 拆到 fasting LOINC 14771-0。
随机尿转铁蛋白(LOINC 3035-3,[Mass/volume] in Urine → mg/L)。尿微量蛋白系列之一,与血清转铁蛋白(key transferrin,g/L)、粪转铁蛋白(key stool_transferrin)均为不同标本,绝不 collapse。
随机尿 IgG(LOINC 33415-1,[Mass/volume] in Urine → mg/L)。尿微量蛋白系列(mALB/TRF/IgG/α1-MG)之一,反映肾小球滤过屏障选择性;与血清 IgG(key igg,g/L)不同标本。
肝纤维化四项之一(LOINC 12736-5,Hyaluronate [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)。国内报 ng/mL 或 µg/L(量纲相同)。
肝纤维化四项之一。OMOP vocab 中无血清 laminin 的 LOINC 标准概念(仅组织免疫染色/Laminin-332 抗体行)→ codes 留空,不编造。

肝纤维化四项之一(LOINC 56627-3,Procollagen type III [Mass/volume] in Serum → ng/mL)。国内试剂盒既叫「Ⅲ型前胶原(PC-III)」也叫「Ⅲ型前胶原 N 端肽(PIIINP)」,同一报告项,故合并;LOINC 的 PIIINP 专用行(57756-9)是 [Units/volume](U/mL),property 与 ng/mL 不符,故不使用。
肝纤维化四项之一。OMOP vocab 中无血清 IV 型胶原的 LOINC 标准概念 → codes 留空。
随机尿淀粉酶(LOINC 33599-2,Amylase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration → U/L)。急性胰腺炎常与血淀粉酶(key amylase,serum/plasma)同开,标本不同,绝不 collapse。
铜蓝蛋白(LOINC 2064-4,[Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma)。肝豆状核变性(Wilson 病)筛查。国内报 g/L 或 mg/L,取 g/L 为 canonical(与 igg/transferrin 等蛋白项一致)。
胃功能三项(PGI/PGII/PGR)之一(LOINC 2736-7,[Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma → ng/mL,即 µg/L)。
胃功能三项之一(LOINC 2738-3,[Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma → ng/mL)。
PGR = PGI/PGII(LOINC 104248-0,[Mass Ratio] in Serum),无量纲 → canonical_unit '1'。
胃功能检测常与 PGI/PGII 同组。LOINC 仅有「总胃泌素」质量浓度行(2333-3,[Mass/volume],pg/mL),既非 G-17 这一特定片段、property 也与国内报告的 pmol/L(molar)不一致 → 不套用,codes 留空。

entries.canonical_name: 尿素呼气试验(幽门螺杆菌)
entries.note: 定性结果(阴性/阳性,DOB 值判读)→ canonical_unit null、units 空。LOINC 29891-9 = Helicobacter pylori [Presence] in Stomach by urea breath test;LOINC 的 system 记为 Stomach(检测靶点),而标本实为呼气,本字典 system 记 'breath' 以贴合报告单。
定性/半定量(阴性/阳性,或滴度 1:40、1:80…)→ canonical_unit null。LOINC 17302-1 = Mycoplasma pneumoniae Ab [Presence] in Serum(通用抗体行)。V1 把 IgM 别名也收在此通用行,IgM/IgG 亚型不作区分(如需区分:IgM Presence = 21406-4)。
LOINC 24467-3 = CD3+CD4+ (T4 helper) cells [#/volume] in Blood。国内报「个/µL」→ canonical '/uL';10*6/L 与 /uL 量纲相同(1 /µL = 1e6/L)。HIV 随访与免疫功能评估常规。
LOINC 54218-3 = CD3+CD4+/CD3+CD8+ cells [# Ratio] in Blood,无量纲 → canonical_unit '1'。
IgG4 亚类(LOINC 2469-5,IgG subclass 4 [Mass/volume] in Serum)。与总 IgG(key igg)是不同分析物 —— igg 的 note 已声明不覆盖 IgG4,本条独立。IgG4 相关性疾病诊断用。
特发性膜性肾病标志抗体(LOINC 73737-9,Phospholipase A2 receptor IgG Ab [Units/volume] in Serum by Immunoassay)。ELISA 法报 RU/mL(相对单位),与 LOINC property(Units/volume,任意单位浓度)一致;IF 法只报滴度/阴阳(81201-6/82991-1),本条按定量行收录。
定性(阴性/阳性,S/CO 判读)→ canonical_unit null、units 空。OMOP vocab 中未检索到 HBV Pre-S1 抗原的 LOINC 概念 → codes 留空。国内乙肝两对半常加做此项以反映病毒复制。
定性(阴性/阳性)→ canonical_unit null、units 空。LOINC 2106-3 = Choriogonadotropin [Presence] in Urine。与血 HCG 定量(key hcg_total,mIU/mL)标本与量纲均不同,绝不 collapse。
LOINC 2164-2 = Creatinine renal clearance in 24 hour Urine and Serum or Plasma(需 24h 尿 + 同期血肌酐)→ system 记 'urine and serum/plasma'。与 eGFR(key egfr,mL/min/1.73m2,公式估算)是不同项,量纲也不同,绝不 collapse。
左旋(S-)氨氯地平,RxNorm 2376944 / ATC C08CA17 实查。与消旋氨氯地平(key amlodipine)是不同 ingredient,不合并;别名刻意只收「左旋…」写法,不碰 amlodipine 的「苯磺酸氨氯地平」。
RxNorm 36118 (salmon calcitonin) / ATC H05BA01 实查。骨质疏松、高钙血症常用。裸「降钙素」在国内处方基本指鲑降钙素,故收为别名;化验项「降钙素原 PCT」是完全不同的词(key pct),不冲突。
RxNorm 29155 / ATC A02AA01(抗酸药)实查(另有 A06AD01 泻药用途,按国内口服抗酸/补镁场景取 A02AA01)。与铝碳酸镁(key hydrotalcite,复方)是不同药,别名不重叠。
RxNorm 42781 (vitamin K2) / OMOP 19106287 实查。ATC 无 vitamin K2 通用 5th 码(仅 menatetrenone 的 M05BX08,是另一 ingredient 概念 19072027,国内「四烯甲萘醌」即其骨质疏松适应证)→ atc 留空,不套用。与维生素K1(key phytomenadione)分开。

aliases: 地塞米松磷酸钠注射液
entries.note: RxNorm 3264 / ATC H02AB02(systemic)实查。「地塞米松磷酸钠」「醋酸地塞米松」是盐/酯型,同一 ingredient → 收为本条别名,不新开条目(与 metformin/盐酸二甲双胍 同样处理)。

aliases: 注射用尖吻蝮蛇血凝酶
entries.note: OMOP concept 35884406 = RxNorm Extension Ingredient「Spearhead Agkistrodon Hemocoagulase」(concept_code OMOP5031330,非真实 RxNorm CUI → rxnorm 留空);ATC 无对应 5th 码 → 留空。「蛇毒血凝酶/血凝酶」在国内处方常泛指本类止血药(另有巴曲亭=Batroxobin,OMOP 35884383,本字典未单列),故泛称收在本条。

aliases: 小儿复方氨基酸注射液
entries.note: 肠外营养复方制剂(多种氨基酸,规格 18AA/15AA/9AA 等)。ATC B05BA01(amino acids; parenteral)实查;OMOP 588017 = RxNorm Extension Ingredient「Amino Acids」(concept_code OMOP3138396,非真实 RxNorm CUI → rxnorm 留空)。具体氨基酸配比不做建模。

aliases: 枯草杆菌二联活菌颗粒
枯草杆菌二联活菌肠溶胶囊
entries.note: 双菌活菌复方,非单一 ingredient → codes 留空(成分对应 OMOP:Bacillus subtilis 42898675 / Enterococcus faecium 794109,ATC 无对应复方 5th 码)。与双歧杆菌三/四联活菌(key bifidobacterium)是不同菌种配方,别名不重叠。
中成药复方(淫羊藿、续断、丹参等,骨质疏松/骨关节炎常用),无 RxNorm/ATC 编码 → codes 留空;ingredient 为复方名。
RxNorm 11251 (vitamin B complex) / OMOP 19010970 实查;ATC 仅有 4 位组 A11EA(B-complex, plain),无 5th 码 → atc 留空。与 multivitamin(多种维生素/善存,含矿物质与其他维生素)是不同制剂,别名刻意不含裸「复合维生素」(已属 multivitamin)。

aliases: 富马酸替诺福韦二吡呋酯
entries.note: RxNorm 300195 / ATC J05AF07 实查(J05AR03 是与恩曲他滨的复方,不套用)。丙酚替诺福韦(TAF/韦立得)是另一 ingredient,本条不覆盖。

aliases: 注射用氢化可的松琥珀酸钠
entries.note: RxNorm 5492 / ATC H02AB09(systemic)实查。注意化验项「皮质醇」(key cortisol)带有别名「氢化可的松」—— 跨类别(lab vs drug)同名允许,靠 category 区分。
ATC B05BC01(parenteral, 渗透性利尿/脱水)实查,取静脉制剂用途。
RxNorm 8308 (vitamin K1) / ATC B02BA01 实查。与维生素K2(key vitamin_k2)是不同 ingredient。

aliases: 门冬氨酸钾镁口服溶液
entries.note: 钾镁复方,非单一 ingredient → rxnorm/omop 留空(成分:potassium aspartate OMOP 19049059、magnesium aspartate OMOP 19019131 / ATC A12CC05);无对应复方 ATC 5th 码 → atc 留空。
普通(未分级)肝素。RxNorm 5224 / ATC B01AB01 实查。与低分子肝素(key enoxaparin,别名含「低分子肝素」)刻意分开,别名不重叠。
氯雷他定的活性代谢物,是独立 ingredient(RxNorm 275635)→ 与 key loratadine 分开,别名不重叠。

aliases: 异丙托溴铵雾化吸入溶液
entries.note: ATC R03BB01(inhalant)实查。与噻托溴铵(key tiotropium)是不同 ingredient。
「依达拉奉右莰醇(先必新)」是依达拉奉+右莰醇复方,与本单方不同,本条不覆盖;「依达拉奉氯化钠注射液」属「药+载液」写法,由提取层剥离载液后落到本条。
ATC C01EA01(parenteral,循环科/糖尿病周围血管病常用脂微球载体制剂)实查。
OMOP concept 35884371 = RxNorm Extension Ingredient「Anisodamine」(concept_code OMOP5031275,非真实 RxNorm CUI → rxnorm 留空);ATC 无对应 5th 码 → 留空。
本地 OMOP vocab 无 reverse T3 的标准 LOINC 概念,codes 留空(不编造)。
ATC 5th 未在本地 vocab 检索到对应码,留空。
码取 RxNorm/ATC 的 polystyrene sulfonate(离子交换树脂);国内钙型与钠型同一成分骨架,盐型差异见剂型。
